Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 6012 0 0}I apologize for making you wait. Is this store the location of our business today?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 2 -1 0 0}According to my data, the services here are capable of making one "face" their "inner self."[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 6051 0 0}Is there truly a distinction to be made between one's inner and outer selves? I will investigate.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 6008 0 0}Thank you for waiting. Hm, this shop has quite a mysterious feel to it...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 2 -1 0 0}I have heard that undergoing a treatment here will help you face your inner self.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 6022 0 0}I wonder what exactly that means... I am curious to try it out.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 6012 0 0}Thank you for waiting. I see that we will be continuing our research on this facility today.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 2 -1 0 0}I will put forth greater effort to remain operational this time. Let us commence.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 6009 0 0}Sorry for making you wait. Oh, were you planning to utilize this store's service again?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 2 -1 0 0}In that case, I'd like to try it again, too. I hope I will be able to stay awake this time...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 6016 0 0}I seem to have unintentionally spent the duration of the treatment in sleep mode.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 2 -1 0 0}However, it appears that the results are identical to having undergone maintenance.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 6142 0 0}I shall return to the dorm at full throttle to confirm these results. Please excuse me.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 6060 0 0}It seems that I fell asleep during the treatment...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 1 2 -1 0 0}But, for some reason, I feel very refreshed. How mysterious...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 6020 0 0}Hm... Maybe I should run diagnostics back at the dorm... I will leave immediately, then. So long.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 6016 0 0}It appears that undergoing this treatment caused me to enter sleep mode again.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 2 -1 0 0}Furthermore, the resulting effects resemble post-maintenance performance again as well.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 6044 0 0}The reason behind these phenomena remains unclear... Regardless, I appreciate you inviting me.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_019_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 6060 0 0}Oh, it seems I fell asleep this time too...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_020_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 1 2 -1 0 0}But I woke up feeling as refreshed as last time as well.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_021_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 6020 0 0}Thank you for inviting me again, {f 4 2}-san.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_022_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It's almost nighttime... I should[n]head back to the dorm.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_023_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It's getting late... I should[n]head back to the dorm.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_024_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 6012 0 0}I apologize for making you wait. Is this store the location of our business today?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_025_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 6 -1 0 0}According to my data, the services here are capable of making one "face" their "inner self."[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_026_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 6051 0 0}Is there truly a distinction to be made between one's inner and outer selves? I will investigate.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_027_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 6008 0 0}Thank you for waiting. Hm, this shop has quite a mysterious feel to it...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_028_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 6 -1 0 0}I have heard that undergoing a treatment here will help you face your inner self.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_029_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 6022 0 0}I wonder what exactly that means... I am curious to try it out.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_030_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 6012 0 0}Thank you for waiting. I see that we will be continuing our research on this facility today.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_031_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 6 -1 0 0}I will put forth greater effort to remain operational this time. Let us commence.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_032_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 6009 0 0}Sorry for making you wait. Oh, were you planning to utilize this store's service again?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_033_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 6 -1 0 0}In that case, I'd like to try it again, too. I hope I will be able to stay awake this time...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_034_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 6016 0 0}I seem to have unintentionally spent the duration of the treatment in sleep mode.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_035_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 6 -1 0 0}However, it appears that the results are identical to having undergone maintenance.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_036_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 6142 0 0}I shall return to the dorm at full throttle to confirm these results. Please excuse me.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_037_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 6060 0 0}It seems that I fell asleep during the treatment...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_038_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 1 6 -1 0 0}But, for some reason, I feel very refreshed. How mysterious...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_039_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 6020 0 0}Hm... Maybe I should run diagnostics back at the dorm... I will leave immediately, then. So long.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_040_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 6016 0 0}It appears that undergoing this treatment caused me to enter sleep mode again.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_041_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 6 -1 0 0}Furthermore, the resulting effects resemble post-maintenance performance again as well.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_042_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 6044 0 0}The reason behind these phenomena remains unclear... Regardless, I appreciate you inviting me.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_043_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 6060 0 0}Oh, it seems I fell asleep this time too...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_044_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 1 6 -1 0 0}But I woke up feeling as refreshed as last time as well.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_045_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 6020 0 0}Thank you for inviting me again, {f 4 2}-san.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_046_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It's almost nighttime... I should[n]head back to the dorm.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_047_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It's getting late... I should[n]head back to the dorm.[n]{f 1 1}
